models.formula: weighted_avg(|K%-BB%|, |xwOBA-.320|, |xBA-.245|, HardHit%, velo, spin, arsenal whiff)
calculation_steps: Normalize rates.
Calculate volatility/contact components.
Blend available pitcher and arsenal inputs.
source_notes: Uses main pitcher aggregate and pitch arsenal data.

models.formula: weighted_avg(Barrel%, HardHit%, launch-angle fit, BB/K, xwOBA, ISO, SLG, OBP)
calculation_steps: Read projected lineup or team split inputs.
Normalize rates and calculate BB/K.
Blend power, discipline, and contact-quality signals.
source_notes: Projected-lineup data is preferred; team split fallback is clearly labeled.

models.formula: BCI = ERA * BB/9 + WHIP
calculation_steps: Read ERA, BB/9, and WHIP from main data if a bullpen table exists.
Calculate only when all required inputs exist.
source_notes: No bullpen score is fabricated when required fields are missing.

models.formula: pitch-mix disruption = usage + whiff% + xwOBA suppression + hard-contact suppression, enriched by hitter-vs-pitch data when present
calculation_steps: Score each pitch in the arsenal.
Identify biggest pitch edge and weakness.
Attach hitter-vs-pitch rows only when production data exists.
source_notes: Pitcher arsenal is real when available; hitter-vs-pitch data is never faked.

models.formula: Team offense prior PA probabilities + opponent starter/bullpen profiles + environment + dynamic starter exit
calculation_steps: Build conservative team offense prior because Model Projections is game-level.
Convert offense, opponent starter prior, bullpen prior, and environment into PA probabilities.
Simulate regulation games with starter-to-bullpen transition and calibrated run distribution.
source_notes: Uses low-confidence team priors until confirmed lineups and player-level projections are wired into this endpoint.
Raw and calibrated outputs are both retained in the simulation object; this card displays calibrated probabilities where available.

models.formula: Monte Carlo total runs from away/home PA distributions, bullpen priors, environment, and calibrated distribution
calculation_steps: Generate PA outcome probabilities for each offense against starter and bullpen contexts.
Run full-game simulation with dynamic starter exit and bullpen transition.
Apply existing game-simulation calibration to expected runs and probability distribution.
source_notes: This is the first Model Projections integration of the sandbox simulation engine.
Confidence is low until lineup-level and starter-profile inputs are connected directly into this endpoint.

models.formula: weighted_avg(|K%-BB%|, |xwOBA-.320|, |xBA-.245|, HardHit%, velo, spin, arsenal whiff)

Future versions should aggregate active relievers by team and role.
